text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Silence Suzuka's signature racewear has arrived.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It's just how I pictured it! I should be able to run
quite freely in this.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Um, Trainer... Would you mind waiting outside a
moment?
choice_data_list: It's already nighttime. Let's wait until tomorrow.
It's already nighttime. Let's wait until tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Ah, right. Tomorrow then.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wake up early the next morning, knowing how
excited Silence Suzuka is to try out her new
racewear. When I arrive at the track...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: What a nice breeze...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Okay, one more lap!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A look of pure exhilaration graces her face as she
dashes down the track...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hesitate to call out to her, as I fear I may be a
disturbance.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... I can still keep going...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um... Good morning.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hm... I can barely feel it... My legs move as if
nothing's in their way. It's great...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I wonder why... Maybe it's the color?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I consider what she's saying. If it is the color...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I consider what she's saying. If it is the color...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes, that's right.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Green is my favorite color. It's the color of the
turf.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Just wearing this makes me feel as though I'm
already on the track.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It's the start of the race, and I'm surrounded by
everyone... But then I start running and running...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Once I've left them behind, the world expands
right in front of my eyes. It's just me... and scenery
all my own.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I want to see that view in every race I run.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
My legs start tingling just thinking about it. I'm
going to run a bit more, okay?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: If you'll excuse me...
choice_data_list: You know classes are about to start, right?
You know classes are about to start, right?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh? Are they really? Already?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At any rate, it is evident that Silence Suzuka's
new signature racewear has her motivated to face
any challenge.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes, that's right.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I've always loved snow-covered landscapes, ever
since I was a child.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It always reminds me of a particularly silvery day,
when I ran from sunup to sundown.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I ran and ran despite the falling snow, all day
long.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
There was no sound but that of my own breathing
and my heartbeat... The world was so serene.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: It's my desire to return to that world...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh... Hehehe. That's right.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It's nothing, really. Thinking about the past is
giving me the urge to go for a run.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: If you'll excuse me...
choice_data_list: You know classes are about to start, right?
You know classes are about to start, right?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh? Are they really? Already?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At any rate, it is evident that Silence Suzuka's
new signature racewear has her motivated to face
any challenge.
